Holiday Gift Guide Quiz

A gift is so much more than a box or a bow. Discover our gifting recommendations for the adults on your list and share the cheer this holiday season.

Mix & Match Local Gifts

Discover Mix and Match Local products for the perfect gift for the person on your list

Gift Wine New Arrivals 

If the person on your list loves to try new wines there are so many wines to choose from this season, there is everything from Prosecco to Sparkling Red for everyone on your list.

Gift Beer New Arrivals 

Discover all of our new beers including a variety of gift packs that feature seasonal flavours like mint, chocolate and orange. There is something for everyone on your list.

Gift Spirit New Arrivals

Discover new spirit arrivals for the perfect gift for the person on your list.

Gift Cooler New Arrivals

From refreshing new flavours like sour cherry, watermelon and cranberry lemonade to advent calendars and mixer packs you are sure to find the perfect gift for everyone on your list that loves new coolers. 

Gift Cider New Arrivals 

The cider lover on your list will love these new arrivals which include a variety of gift packs and seasonal flavours.

Gift Holiday New Arrivals

Discover all new arrivals for everyone on your list there is something for everyone with advent calendars, gift packs and new seasonal flavours your sure to find the perfect gift. 

Gift Local Wine

White, red, sparkling and rose we make it all here in Nova Scotia you are sure to find the perfect gift for the wine lovers on your list from one of our many local producers.

Gift Local Beer

For that hard to buy for beer lover you cant go wrong with beer from one of our local breweries, with seasonal flavours and gift packs to choose from your sure to discover the perfect gift. 

Gift Local Spirits

Discover the perfect gift from our local distilleries for the spirit lover on your list from seasonal flavours to classic spirits like gin and whisky your sure to find just what you are looking for everyone on your list.

Gift Local Coolers

Looking for the perfect gift for the cooler lover on your list discover refreshing flavours like watermelon and raspberry dragon fruit or get them a variety of flavours to try with a mixer pack. 

Gift Local Cider

Nova Scotia is Canada’s oldest apple growing region our local producers are making amazing ciders that make the perfect gift for the cider lover on your list. 

Gift Local

There are so many amazing local wineries, breweries, distilleries and cideries in Nova Scotia you are sure to find the perfect local gift for the everyone on your list.

Gift Best of 2022 Wine

Discover the best wines of 2022! These wines are the popular picks for the year, you cant go wrong with the wines that everyone keeps going back too.

Gift Best of 2022 Beer

Discover the best beers of 2022! You are sure to find the for everyone on your list with these popular picks

Gift Best of 2022 Spirits

Looking for spirit gift recommendations, look no further. Find the perfect gift for the spirit lover on your list that are everyone loved in 2022.  

Gift Best of 2022 Coolers

Discover the coolers that everyone loved this year from variety packs to new flavours you are sure to find the perfect gift from our best of 2022 coolers

Best of 2022 Cider

Sweet, tart or dry you will find the perfect cider for the person on your list with these favourite ciders of 2022. 

Gift Best of 2022

Looking for a gift that you know they will love. Discover the best of 2022 wines, spirits, beer, cider and coolers for everyone on your list. 

Gift Sparkling Wine

Add sparkle to your gift? Discover sparkling wines that are sure to make your gift pop!

Gift Sipping Spirits

Discover sipping spirits that are sure to please the spirit lover that is hard to buy for. From whiskey to rum, you are sure to find a gift that will make a splash

Gift Wine Stocking Stuffers

Discover the perfect stocking stuffer for the wine lover on your list from sparkling’s to roses you’re sure to find the perfect wine for their stocking.

Gift Beer Stocking Stuffers

Chocolate orange, milk and cookies and latte are some of the single-serve seasonal flavours that will make the perfect stocking stuffer for the beer lover on your list

Gift Spirit Stocking Stuffers

There are so many options for the spirit enthusiast on your list, from seasonal flavours like gingerbread and cinnamon to gift packs that split up to cross multiple people off your list.

Gift Cooler Stocking Stuffers

Coolers can be enjoyed all year round and with seasonal flavours like spiced eggnog and gingerbread the cider lover in your life is sure to be excited to find these in their stocking. 

Gift Cider Stocking Stuffers 

With returning favourites and new seasonal flavours there are so many ciders to discover for the perfect stocking stuffer

Gift Stocking Stuffers

Discover all the perfect stocking stuffers for the everyone on your list from Gingerbread Gin Mule to Mint Chocolate Stout your sure to find the perfect stocking stuffer.

How much are you planning on spending on this gift?

What is your recipient’s go-to drink?  

How would your recipient choose a restaurant?
